channel.title: Humor on The Guyana Brief
channel.description: Recent content in Humor on The Guyana Brief

item.title: Back-A-Truck — March 19, 2026
item.description: Guyana's most fictional classifieds. Items for sale, wanted, and otherwise negotiable.

item.title: Bam-Bam Sally's Corner — March 19, 2026
item.description: Bam-Bam Sally has opinions on this week's events. She always does. All names fictional.

item.title: Bounty Board — March 19, 2026
item.description: Georgetown's most fictional wanted board. Rewards offered. Results not guaranteed.

item.title: DJ Roadblock's Friday Wind-Down — March 19, 2026
item.description: DJ Roadblock recaps the week from the booth. Oil at $100, the Mohameds lose again, and de roads still not fix.

item.title: Patriots Portfolio — Week of March 19, 2026
item.description: Your weekly satirical investment guide to the Guyanese national situation. Buy, Sell, or Hold.

item.title: Speedeet & Wilar: De Science Experiment
item.description: Speedeet has a theory about vinegar and baking soda. Wilar has a bad feeling about this.

item.title: 🗣️ Bam-Bam Sally's Rumor Mill: Super Bowl Flag, Pump Station Drama, and Who Blacklisted Who
item.description: Bam-Bam Sally heard that somebody in the diaspora paid Bad Bunny to wave the Guyana flag, a certain pump station contractor is hiding from the Minister, and the blacklist is longer than 30 names.

item.title: 🔥 Bam-Bam Sally's Rumor Mill: January 24, 2026
item.description: De hottest fictional gossip from de streets! All names fake, all scenarios made up, all entertainment guaranteed!

item.title: Bam-Bam Sally's Rumor Mill: The Opposition Leader Tea Is SCALDING This Week
item.description: The completely fictional whispers making rounds in Georgetown this week. All names changed, all situations imagined, all entertainment guaranteed.

item.title: The Rumor Mill: What Georgetown Whispering This Week
item.description: The completely fictional whispers making rounds in Georgetown this week. All names changed, all situations imagined, all entertainment guaranteed.
